title: Customer service email
description: Empathetic but efficient customer reply at high speed
text: Hi Mark, thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry to hear about the trouble with order #8432. I've checked the shipment, and it appears the parcel was delayed at the regional hub. A replacement is now on its way and should arrive by Friday. Please let me know if there's anything else I can help with. Best regards, Lisa.

tips.text: Customer support typists handle 50-100 tickets a day
Empathetic tone + speed = service career gold

tips.target: Hi Mark, thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry to hear about the trouble with order #8432. I've checked the shipment, and it appears the parcel was delayed at

tips.text: The phrase "thank you for reaching out" should be muscle memory

tips.target: the regional hub. A replacement is now on its way and should arrive by Friday. Please let me know if there's anything else I can help with. Best regards, Lisa.

character_tips.anna: Customer service is real-world high-volume typing. Master this rhythm.
character_tips.maxim: Support reps type more than most coders. This is a real career skill.
character_tips.knopych: SUPPORT HERO! 🦸 Save the customer, fast!
character_tips.klavochka: Kind words at speed, my dear — kindness is rhythm too 💕
